main.description: Get an access grant token for a space. The grant is a signed token identifying the user and app to the space owner; it can be exchanged with the space owner for a space credential. The owner's PDS decides whether to honor the grant via its configured space-management implementation. The caller's PDS only attests to identity + app, gated by the OAuth scope — it makes no claim that the user is a member of the space. Requires OAuth auth.

grant.description: A signed JWT access grant token.
